mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, job_no, source_system, direction, biz_type, request_payload, response_payload, status, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM integration_job WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO integration_job ( tenant_id, job_no, source_system, direction, biz_type, request_payload, response_payload, status, error_message, started_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{jobNo}, #{sourceSystem}, #{direction}, #{bizType}, #{requestPayload, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{responsePayload, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE integration_job SET job_no = #{jobNo}, source_system = #{sourceSystem}, direction = #{direction}, biz_type = #{bizType}, request_payload = #{requestPayload, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, response_payload = #{responsePayload, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
